rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §22.0835, which governs criminal history record access for student teachers and volunteers. The provisions address entirely different subject matters.
quote: Sec. 22.0835. ACCESS TO CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORDS OF STUDENT TEACHERS AND VOLUNTEERS BY LOCAL AND REGIONAL EDUCATION AUTHORITIES.
_note: No conflict; the rule text concerns criminal background checks for school volunteers and student teachers, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
